assertions.issues: End-to-end full-page integration blocked by server-side HTTP 500 responses on all tested locale routes.

frictions.description: agent-browser network log output did not include HTTP status codes, so curl checks were added for explicit 500 status evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used curl status probes alongside agent-browser screenshots and console checks.

blockers.description: Application returned HTTP 500 for all tested locale routes (including /en home and all assigned fixture pages), preventing runtime i18n validation through the user surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried target URLs multiple times via curl, reloaded/navigated with agent-browser, and verified repeated 500 responses persisted.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions; all 5 are blocked by persistent HTTP 500 responses on the application user surface. Code inspection confirms locale enum mapping and fallback logic are implemented, but runtime behavior could not be validated.
